faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about using Doktochain
faq.generalA1: Doktochain is a comprehensive healthcare platform that connects patients with verified healthcare providers across Canada. We make it easy to book appointments, access medical records, and receive quality care both online and in-person.
faq.generalA2: Yes! Creating an account and booking appointments through Doktochain is completely free for patients. You only pay for the medical services provided by your healthcare provider.
faq.generalQ3: How do I create an account?
faq.generalA3: Click the "Sign Up" button at the top of the page and follow the simple registration process. You will need to provide basic information and verify your email address.
faq.bookingQ1: How do I book an appointment?
faq.bookingA1: Search for a provider by specialty, location, or name. View their profile, select an available time slot, and confirm your booking. You will receive a confirmation email with all the details.
faq.bookingQ2: Can I cancel or reschedule my appointment?
faq.bookingA2: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule appointments through your account dashboard. Please note that providers may have their own cancellation policies.
faq.bookingQ3: How far in advance can I book?
faq.bookingA3: You can book appointments up to 3 months in advance, depending on provider availability. Many providers also offer same-day appointments.
faq.insuranceA1: We work with most major insurance providers across Canada. You can check if your insurance is accepted by searching for providers who accept your specific plan.
faq.insuranceQ2: How do I add my insurance information?
faq.insuranceA2: You can add your insurance information in your account profile settings. This helps us show you providers who accept your insurance plan.
faq.telemedA1: A virtual consultation is a video appointment with a healthcare provider conducted through our secure platform. It is convenient for non-emergency medical issues and follow-up visits.
faq.telemedQ2: What do I need for a video appointment?
faq.telemedA2: You need a device with a camera and microphone (smartphone, tablet, or computer), a stable internet connection, and the Doktochain app or website.
faq.telemedA3: Yes, all video consultations use end-to-end encryption and comply with HIPAA regulations to protect your privacy and health information.
faq.supportTeamHelp: Our support team is here to help you

help.title: How can we help you?
help.subtitle: Search our help center or browse by category
help.topicGettingStartedDesc: Learn how to create an account and book your first appointment
help.topicForPatientsDesc: Manage appointments, prescriptions, and health records
help.topicForProvidersDesc: Set up your practice profile and manage your schedule
help.topicSecurityDesc: Learn how we protect your health data with encryption, audit trails, and consent controls
help.gsQ1: How do I create an account?
help.gsA1: Click the "Sign Up" button in the top right corner of the homepage. Choose your account type (Patient, Provider, or Pharmacy) and fill in your information. You'll receive a confirmation email to verify your account.
help.gsA2: Creating an account is free for patients. Providers and pharmacies may have subscription fees. Please check our pricing page for more details.
help.gsQ3: What insurance providers do you accept?
help.gsA3: We work with most major insurance providers including OHIP, RAMQ, MSP BC, Alberta Health Services, and Manitoba Health. Check with individual providers to confirm they accept your specific plan.
help.patQ1: How do I book an appointment?
help.patA1: Use the search bar to find providers by specialty, location, or name. Click on a provider's profile, view their available times, and select a slot that works for you. You'll receive a confirmation email and SMS reminder.
help.patQ2: Can I have a video consultation?
help.patA2: Yes! Many providers offer telehealth consultations. Look for the video icon when browsing providers. Video visits are great for follow-ups, prescription refills, and minor health concerns.
help.patQ3: How do I access my medical records?
help.patA3: Log in to your patient dashboard and click on "Medical Records" or "Health Records". You can view, download, and share your records securely with healthcare providers.
help.patQ4: How do I request a prescription refill?
help.patA4: Go to your dashboard, click "Prescriptions", and select the medication you need refilled. Your provider will be notified and can approve the refill electronically.
help.provQ1: How do I get verified as a healthcare provider?
help.provA1: Complete your profile with your medical license information, credentials, and practice details. Our verification team will review your application within 2-3 business days.
help.provQ2: How do I set my availability?
help.provA2: Go to your provider dashboard, click "Schedule" or "Availability", and set your working hours, appointment types, and time slots. You can also block off time for breaks or personal appointments.
help.provQ3: How does billing and payment work?
help.provA3: We support insurance billing, private pay, and mixed payment methods. Set up your payment gateway in the billing section. Payments are processed securely and transferred to your account according to your preferences.
help.techA1: If you've forgotten your password, click "Forgot Password" on the login page. If you're still having issues, try clearing your browser cache and cookies, or contact our support team.
help.techA2: Make sure you've granted camera and microphone permissions in your browser. Check your internet connection speed. We recommend using Chrome or Firefox for the best experience. If issues persist, try refreshing the page or contact technical support.
help.techA3: Yes! We use bank-level encryption and are fully HIPAA and PIPEDA compliant. Your health information is stored securely and only accessible to you and authorized healthcare providers.
help.secQ1: How does Row-Level Security (RLS) protect my data?
help.secA1: Our database uses Row-Level Security policies that enforce access control at the database level, not just in the application. This means even if there's an application vulnerability, your data remains protected. Only users with explicit consent or ownership can see your records, and this is verified by the database on every query.
help.secQ2: What is a cryptographic audit trail and how does it help me?
help.secA2: Every action on DoktoChain—including every time someone accesses your health records—is recorded in an immutable, tamper-proof chain. Each record includes a cryptographic hash that links it to the previous record. This makes the audit trail tamper-evident: any attempt to alter historical records would be immediately detected. You can view your complete audit trail in your dashboard.
help.secQ3: How are prescriptions secured when shared with pharmacies?
help.secA3: When you direct a prescription to a pharmacy, our database enforces that the pharmacy can only access that specific prescription and related patient demographics. The pharmacy cannot access your other prescriptions, medical conditions, or health history. Your consent is time-limited and automatically expires when the prescription is filled, after which the pharmacy loses access.
help.secQ4: Can I verify who accessed my health records?
help.secA4: Absolutely. Your dashboard includes a complete audit trail showing every time your records were accessed, who accessed them, when, and why. This includes provider access, pharmacy access, and any downloads or exports. You can revoke access at any time, which immediately disconnects the user from your data.
help.secQ5: How long are audit trail records kept?
help.secA5: Audit trail records are kept for a minimum of 10 years, ensuring comprehensive accountability and regulatory compliance. The entire chain is encrypted and stored redundantly across secure facilities in Canada. You can view your personal audit trail anytime, and request third-party verification of the trail's integrity.
help.secQ6: Is my data FHIR-compliant and can I take it elsewhere?
help.secA6: Yes! All health data is stored in FHIR R4 format (Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources), a global healthcare data standard. You can export your complete health record as a FHIR bundle at any time, making it compatible with other healthcare systems, EHRs, and provincial health networks. You own your data and can move it freely.
help.secQ7: What happens when I revoke consent?
help.secA7: When you revoke consent, access is terminated immediately (within milliseconds, enforced by the database). The provider cannot access your data even if they have cached information. Your revocation is recorded in the audit trail and the provider is notified. The action is irreversible, giving you complete control.
help.secQ8: What encryption standards does DoktoChain use?
help.secA8: We use AES-256 encryption (the same standard used by banks) for data at rest and TLS 1.3 (the latest security protocol) for data in transit. All encryption keys are managed securely and rotated regularly. We provide detailed encryption specifications in our Security Whitepaper.

about.welcomeDesc: A patient-controlled, cross-provincial health data network enabling secure, compliant, and instant access to care -- powered by verifiable audit trails and smart-contract consent.

forBusiness.heroTitle: Grow your healthcare business with Doktochain

forBusiness.pharmaciesSubtitle: Everything you need to manage prescriptions, inventory, and customer relationships.
forBusiness.pharm1Desc: Receive prescriptions directly from providers on the platform with full patient and drug details.
forBusiness.pharm2Desc: Track stock levels, set low-stock alerts, and manage your product catalog with ease.
forBusiness.pharm3Desc: Build patient profiles, track order history, and manage refill requests in one place.

forBusiness.clinic2Desc: Centralized booking system with availability management for all clinic providers.
forBusiness.clinic3Desc: Process patient payments, track insurance claims, and manage clinic finances.
forBusiness.clinic4Desc: PIPEDA-compliant data handling with full audit trails for every patient interaction.
forBusiness.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of pharmacies and clinics already using Doktochain to grow their business.
